sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ إِيمَانُ صَوْتَ مُوسِيقَى مِنَ الطَّابِقِ الْعُلْوِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Iman je čula zvuk muzike s gornjeg sprata.
sentences.translationEn: Iman heard the sound of music from the upper floor.

sentences.translation: Gornji sprat je uvijek bio prazan.
sentences.translationEn: The upper floor was always empty.

sentences.translation: Iman je polako popela i otvorila vrata.
sentences.translationEn: Iman went up slowly and opened the door.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ جَارَتَهَا الْجَدِيدَةَ تَعْزِفُ عَلَى الْبِيَانُو.
sentences.translation: Pronašla je svoju novu komšinicu kako svira klavir.
sentences.translationEn: She found her new neighbour playing the piano.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَتَا وَصَارَتَا صَدِيقَتَيْنِ مِنْ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Nasmijale su se i postale prijateljice od tog dana.
sentences.translationEn: They smiled and became friends from that day on.
